messages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.

suppressedMessages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.
React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'googleToken' and 'syncCalendar'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [googleToken, syncCalendar]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'carregarAtendimentos'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [carregarAtendimentos]

messages.message: '_ignored' is assigned a value but never used.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'carregarDadosBase'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [mesSelecionado, anoSelecionado, pagina, carregarDadosBase]

messages.message: '_err' is defined but never used.
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'carregarDados'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [carregarDados]
